title: Beille Kitchen Utensils High Heat Resistance Baking Cooking Tools (Many Styles)
description:
Want to step up your cooking and meal prep game? Then you need the Beille solid spoon made with wheat straw! These spoons are made with an innovative plant based material called wheat straw that mimics classic kitchen tools without the harmful byproducts of traditional plastic. Wheat straw is a bioplastic that is not made from fossil fuels making it more sustainable and a great zero waste option. It’s certified BPA free and food grade safe so you can count on it for food and meal prep. The spoon is dishwasher safe for easy clean up after use. The large kitchen spoon features a sturdy handle made of durable, corrosion resistant stainless steel that won’t rust so you can count on it to last

Beille Kitchen Utensils High Heat Resistance Baking Cooking Tools (Many Styles)

Want to step up your cooking and meal prep game? Then you need Beille kitchen utensil tools! These spoons, spatulas, and ladles are made with food-grade materials that does not cause harmful chemical contamination of food like other similar utensils.

Key Features

  • ESSENTIAL KITCHEN UTENSILS - Beille utensils are a must-have kitchen tool for cooking, meal, and food prep. Large wooden handle with a broad spatula base will quickly and safely turn food while cooking and keep your hands safe from heat
  • FOOD GRADE MATERIALS - Kitchen spatula made of food-grade materials which do not cause harmful chemical contamination of food like other similar spatulas. Silicone and Wheat Straw are certified BPA-free and food-safe
  • SOLID AND DURABLE - Beille utensils use materials that mimic traditional plastic spatulas and food turners without harmful byproducts. Solid-head spatula is dishwasher safe and can be used with both hot and cold food ingredients
  • ERGONOMIC HANDLE - Sturdy handle made of durable materials so you can count on it to last, and ergonomic handle provides comfort during use; Comes with handy slot in handle for easy hang storage if preferred; Trendy color will fit nicely with any kitchen decor
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Color: cream, chrome; Material: 60% wheat straw, 40% polypropylene, stainless steel; Dimensions: 13 x 2.4 inches

Product Specifications

  • MPN: BLECKTLS
  • UPC: 810058483270
  • Color: Beige

The silicone or wheat straw tools mimic traditional plastic utensils and food turners without harmful byproducts. It features a solid head, is dishwasher safe, and can be used with hot and cold food ingredients.

Our tools a sturdy handle made of durable material so you can count on it to last, and the ergonomic handle design will provide comfort and help prevent slippage during use. The handle features a handy slot for easy hang storage if preferred, and it comes in a sleek, trendy color that will fit nicely with just about any kitchen decor.

Every kitchen needs a reliable, durable, and solid spatula. With the Beille kitchen utensils, you can cook and meal prep with peace of mind knowing you’re doing your part to protect yourself, your family, and the planet from harmful plastics.
